tasks.task: Launch title/deed, inherited, tax, and probate ad groups as separate campaigns or tight ad groups.
tasks.why: Keyword export has 765 rows, including title/deed (270), tax/lien (90), probate/inherited (150), and foreclosure (30) intent mentions.

tasks.task: Review search terms twice per week and add negatives before increasing budget.
tasks.why: Real estate terms attract job seekers, rentals, agents, classes, Zillow/Redfin searches, and low-intent research queries.

tasks.task: Add call tracking and form conversion tracking before scaling paid traffic.
tasks.why: Without phone/form conversion data, Google Ads optimization will chase clicks instead of leads.

tasks.task: Publish 2-3 safe Google Business Profile posts from the GBP playbook this week.
tasks.why: GBP posts should be educational/local and link to website pages. Hard-sell or distress-heavy posts are more likely to be rejected.

tasks.task: Shorten page titles on top city/service pages first.
tasks.why: 592 pages have long titles. Google may truncate them, lowering click-through rate.

tasks.task: Rewrite short meta descriptions on high-intent pages.
tasks.why: 175 pages have short descriptions. Better snippets can improve organic CTR.

tasks.task: Review duplicate-title warnings and redirect or rewrite pages that compete with each other.
tasks.why: 12 duplicate-title clusters remain. Some may be intentional, but large clusters create doorway-page risk.

tasks.task: Create one new proof asset every week: case study, review story, proof-of-funds explainer, or title-problem FAQ.
tasks.why: Authority compounds when Google sees real proof and sellers see credible examples.
